page: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v5 is an Intel-based virtual machine belonging to the EDSv5 server family. It is configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, and the system utilizes the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding 7.0 GB of RAM per vCPU, and includes 3686 GB of local storage alongside Premium Storage capabilities.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench multi-core scores placing in the top 25%. Single-core performance is moderate, falling in the middle 50% tier. Memory subsystem performance is highly robust, with read-only large block memory bandwidth reaching 330.43 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 135.06 GB/sec, both ranking in the top 25%. Cryptographic execution is exceptionally strong, with the Passmark CPU encryption test scoring in the top 10% tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E96ds_v5 offers a dense allocation of memory and high-capacity local storage relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for workloads requiring high memory capacity without the premium of specialized bare-metal hardware. The server is well-suited for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large relational databases, high-throughput Redis deployments, and data warehousing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the EDSv5 family, powered by a 96-vCPU Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance provides 672.0 GB of RAM and 3686 GB of local storage. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core processing and memory bandwidth, with read-only large block memory bandwidth reaching 330.43 GB/sec. Cryptographic performance is particularly notable, ranking in the top 10% on the Passmark encryption test. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial local storage, the E96ds_v5 is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale database operations, high-throughput Redis caching, and enterprise-grade data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v5 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 96 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 3686 GB local storage, delivering strong multi-core and top-tier cryptographic performance for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 96 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 3686 GB local storage, ideal for databases and enterprise applications.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and substantial local NVMe storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8370C processors at 2.8 GHz
672.0 GB of system memory and 3686 GB of local NVMe storage
Top 10% performance in cryptographic execution benchmarks
